summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All five hydrated PRs are open, non-security-sensitive, and independently scoped; no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is allowed or sufficiently supported by this job.

actions.reason: Independent open PR requiring normal maintainer review; not a duplicate or low-signal closeout target.
Independent test-coverage PR with mixed proof/check state; keep for maintainer review rather than close.
Independent Windows hardlink test PR with failing checks and author-waiting label; keep open for normal follow-up.
Independent channel-specific test PR with failing checks; keep open for maintainer/author follow-up.
Independent focused bug-fix PR that may be ready for maintainer review, but this plan job cannot merge or close linked refs.
